---
title: "Trazabilidad"
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(fs)
root <- normalizePath("..\\..\\..", winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)
read_csv_safe <- function(...) readr::read_csv(fs::path(root, ...), show_col_types = FALSE)
preflight <- read_csv_safe("REPORTS","preflight_checks.csv")
baseline <- list.files(fs::path(root, "REPORTS"), pattern = "baseline_contract_comparison.*\\.csv$", full.names = TRUE)
```

```{r}
preflight %>% knitr::kable()
```

```{r}
tibble(archivo = baseline) %>% knitr::kable()
```
